title: lithocarpus yangchunensis
intro: Lithocarpus yangchunensis, also known as Yangchun Burdock or Yangchun Lithocarpus, is a species of flowering plant in the beech family, Fagaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting digestion. Lithocarpus yangchunensis can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, capsules, and infusions, which are available in some Asian markets and online stores.
